 C:\msys64\mingw64.exe 
 渲染是不断在双缓冲里更新图片，surface是个单缓冲不变的固定图片
 C:\Users\明耀寒玥\Desktop\SDL_game
 cd /c/Users/明耀寒玥/Desktop/SDL_game/sdl_game1
 gcc main.c -o game $(pkg-config --cflags --libs sdl2 SDL2_image)
./game
mingw32-make

给瓦片按地形分类


int calc_damage(Pokemon *atk, Pokemon *def) {
    int damage = atk->attack + atk->skill.power - def->defense;

    if (damage < 1)
        damage = 1;

    return damage;
}

void do_attack(Pokemon *atk, Pokemon *def) {
    int damage = calc_damage(atk, def);

    def->hp -= damage;
    if (def->hp < 0)
        def->hp = 0;

    printf("%s used %s!\n", atk->name, atk->skill.name);
    printf("%s took %d damage!\n", def->name, damage);

}

void battle_update(Battle *battle) {
    switch (battle->state) {

    case BATTLE_START:
        printf("A wild %s appeared!\n", battle->enemy->name);
        battle->state = PLAYER_TURN;
        break;

    case PLAYER_TURN:
        // 现在版本：默认玩家必选攻击
        do_attack(battle->player, battle->enemy);
        if (battle->enemy->hp <= 0) {
            printf("%s fainted!\n", battle->enemy->name);
            battle->state = BATTLE_END;
            break;
        }
        battle->state = ENEMY_TURN;
        break;

    case ENEMY_TURN:
        do_attack(battle->enemy, battle->player);
        if (battle->player->hp <= 0) {
            printf("%s fainted!\n", battle->player->name);
            battle->state = BATTLE_END;
            break;
        }
        battle->state = PLAYER_TURN;
        break;
    case BATTLE_END:
        printf("Battle over!\n");
        break;
    }
}

int main() {
    Skill tackle = {"Tackle", 5};

    Pokemon pikachu = {
        "pikaqiu",
        30, 30,
        10, 5,
        tackle
    };

    Pokemon wild_mon = {
        "Rattata",
        25, 25,
        8, 4,
        tackle
    };

    Battle battle = {
        &pikachu,
        &wild_mon,
        BATTLE_START
    };

    while (battle.state != BATTLE_END) {
        battle_update(&battle);
    }

    return 0;
}
